text: How do plants convert light energy into chemical energy?
gold_answer: In photosynthesis, chlorophyll in chloroplasts absorbs sunlight to make ATP and NADPH, and the Calvin cycle fixes carbon dioxide into glucose

text: What is released as a byproduct when water is split during photosynthesis?
When did the Western Roman Empire fall and who deposed the last emperor?
gold_answer: 476 AD, when Odoacer deposed the last emperor

text: What is the event horizon of a black hole?
gold_answer: the boundary beyond which nothing, not even light, can escape

text: How many chambers does the human heart have and what are they?
gold_answer: four chambers: two atria and two ventricles

text: What is overfitting in machine learning?
gold_answer: when a model memorizes the training data instead of generalizing

text: What determines how explosive a volcanic eruption is?
gold_answer: the viscosity of the magma and its dissolved gas content

text: Who invented the World Wide Web and when?
Why do antibiotics not help against a cold?
gold_answer: because a cold is caused by a virus and antibiotics only work against bacteria

text: What is the difference between weather and climate?
gold_answer: weather is short-term atmospheric conditions; climate is the average over decades

text: What are the four bases of DNA and how do they pair?
gold_answer: adenine, thymine, guanine, cytosine; A pairs with T and G with C
